message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User

box "Backend Environment"
participant Server
participant SuperHeroApi
end box

alt user search
    User -> Server : GET /search?q=<queryValue>
    Server <<-- SuperHeroApi : getFromCache (queryValue) ?
    hnote over Server : binarySearch (query)

    alt has in cache
        User <-- Server : 200: queryValue
    end

    alt not has in cache: request to API
        Server -> SuperHeroApi : GET queryValue
        Server <-- SuperHeroApi : 200: queryValue
        Server -> Server : updateCache (queryValue)
    end
end

User <-- Server : 200: queryValue

@enduml
```
